title: Jaymon
body:
## A optimized experience
With the use of mods such as sodium this modpack was designed to be able to run on lower end pcs while still having a rich amount of content

## A enhanced world
With terrain generation mods such as Tectonic the terrain is much more diverse and realistic than the usual minecraft terrain is

## Realistic cobblemon
The Cobblemon in this modpack are much more realistic in how they act and what you can do with them compared to the base mod with the use of addon mods for the Cobblemon mod

### Other Features
- Shaders
- QOL Additions
- Easy Multiplayer (ESSENTIAL Mod)
- Improved Combat
